_description: Canonical TENKi source manifest. One entry per study database.

_fields.name: Canonical short key used in all experiment scripts
_fields.db_path: Path relative to the color_mixing_lab repo root
_fields.engine_a: Primary engine (for single-engine or set-op A-side)
_fields.engine_b: Second engine for set-op studies; null for single-engine
_fields.paired_with_spectral: True iff targets share index with db_1000_spectral
_fields.is_atomic_venn_region: True iff this DB covers exactly one Venn atom
_fields.generate_cmd: Command to (re)generate this database from the repo root

baseline_9.name: spectral
baseline_9.generate_cmd: uv run python scripts/generate_policy_data.py --engine spectral --shared-targets-file output/shared_targets.json --experiments 50 --output output/db_1000_spectral

baseline_9.name: mixbox
baseline_9.generate_cmd: uv run python scripts/generate_policy_data.py --engine mixbox --shared-targets-file output/shared_targets.json --experiments 50 --output output/db_1000_mixbox

baseline_9.name: km
baseline_9.generate_cmd: uv run python scripts/generate_policy_data.py --engine kubelka_munk --shared-targets-file output/shared_targets.json --experiments 50 --output output/db_1000_km

baseline_9.name: ryb
baseline_9.generate_cmd: uv run python scripts/generate_policy_data.py --engine coloraide_ryb --shared-targets-file output/shared_targets.json --experiments 50 --output output/db_1000_ryb

baseline_9.name: study_a
baseline_9.generate_cmd: uv run python scripts/generate_policy_data.py --set-op intersection --engine-a mixbox --engine-b coloraide_ryb --shared-targets-file output/shared_targets.json --experiments 50 --output output/db_1000_study_a_artist_consensus

baseline_9.name: study_b
baseline_9.generate_cmd: uv run python scripts/generate_policy_data.py --set-op difference --engine-a spectral --engine-b coloraide_ryb --shared-targets-file output/shared_targets.json --experiments 50 --output output/db_1000_study_b_physics_vs_artist

baseline_9.name: study_b_reverse
baseline_9.generate_cmd: uv run python scripts/generate_policy_data.py --set-op difference --engine-a coloraide_ryb --engine-b spectral --shared-targets-file output/shared_targets.json --experiments 50 --output output/db_1000_study_b_reverse_artist_vs_physics

baseline_9.name: study_c
baseline_9.generate_cmd: uv run python scripts/generate_policy_data.py --set-op difference --engine-a kubelka_munk --engine-b mixbox --shared-targets-file output/shared_targets.json --experiments 50 --output output/db_1000_study_c_oilpaint_vs_fooddye

baseline_9.name: study_c_reverse
baseline_9.generate_cmd: uv run python scripts/generate_policy_data.py --set-op difference --engine-a mixbox --engine-b kubelka_munk --shared-targets-file output/shared_targets.json --experiments 50 --output output/db_1000_study_c_reverse_fooddye_vs_oilpaint

mirror_8.name: spectral_diff_mixbox
mirror_8.generate_cmd: uv run python scripts/generate_policy_data.py --set-op difference --engine-a spectral --engine-b mixbox --shared-targets-file output/shared_targets.json --experiments 50 --output output/db_spectral_diff_mixbox

mirror_pair_definitions._note: Each entry names a pair (forward, mirror). Both must exist for Q1 mirror-symmetry test.
